content:
The OpenAI API Project I Built on a Rainy Weekend Quietly Turned Into a Business I Never Planned
I originally signed up for the OpenAI API because I was curious. I wanted to automate a few writing tasks and maybe build a fun side project. What I didn’t expect was that one small experiment would evolve into a collection of AI tools that businesses were willing to pay for every single month.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by Octavian-Dan Craciun on Unsplash1. I Thought the API Was Just for Chatbots I Couldn’t Have Been More Wrong
When most people hear OpenAI API, they immediately think of chatbots.
I did too.
My first project was exactly what you’d expect.
A simple command-line chatbot.
It answered questions.
It remembered almost nothing.
It looked impressive for about five minutes.
Then reality hit.
Nobody wanted another chatbot.
Businesses wanted something completely different.
They wanted reports generated automatically.
